source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth hypertension assessment and follow-up; partial for a general setting-agnostic follow-up workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth hypertension scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

rewritten_legacy_items.final_wording: Lists severe blood pressure, confusion, visual changes, chest pain, breathlessness, neurological symptoms, severe headache, and specialist referral criteria.

added_items.final_wording: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth hypertension scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.population: Adults with suspected or established hypertension.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth hypertension assessment and follow-up; partial for a general setting-agnostic follow-up workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth hypertension scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

added_items.rationale: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency exclusions.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies office, repeated home, and ambulatory blood-pressure assessment and hypertension staging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.population: Adults with suspected or established hypertension.

source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth hypertension assessment and follow-up; partial for a general setting-agnostic follow-up workflow.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped blood-pressure terminology, repeated or home readings, and staged measurement context.

added_items.final_wording: Describes monitoring phases, clinician-judged laboratory review, lifestyle domains, and monthly review context.
